Our proven treatments create a protective barrier around your property, giving you peace of mind all season long.

localContext: Brownsville's proximity to parks like Betsy Head Park and Howard Playground, along with numerous community gardens and residential yards, creates ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. The neighborhood's mix of low-rise apartment buildings, row houses, and green spaces requires specialized tick treatment strategies to protect all residents from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Brownsville?
faqs.answer: Brownsville has several parks and green spaces where ticks thrive, including Betsy Head Park and Howard Playground. Ticks carry Lyme disease and other serious illnesses, making professional control essential for protecting your family and pets who use these outdoor areas.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Brownsville?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Brownsville range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and customized quotes to ensure you get effective treatment at a fair price.

faqs.question: How often should I get tick treatment in Brownsville?
faqs.answer: We recommend seasonal tick treatments in Brownsville, typically starting in early spring and continuing through fall. Most properties benefit from treatments every 4-6 weeks during peak tick season to maintain protection, especially if you have pets or children who play outdoors.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved tick control products that are highly effective against ticks while being safe for children and pets once dried. Our technicians are trained in proper application methods and will provide you with specific safety instructions for your Brownsville property.
